<!--
Thanks for taking the time to file a bug. Please fill in as much of the
following as you can — the more concrete the report, the faster it can be
triaged.
-->

**Environment**

- Wrangle version: <!-- e.g. 1.3.0 — Wrangle → About Wrangle -->
- macOS version: <!-- e.g. 15.2 (Sequoia) — Apple menu → About This Mac -->
- Mac model: <!-- e.g. MacBook Pro M3, Mac mini M2 — Apple Silicon only -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what's wrong. -->

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

<!-- What you thought would happen. -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include any error dialogs, console output, or
log lines if you have them. -->

## Screenshot or screen recording

<!-- Drag and drop an image or short clip here. For rendering bugs a
screenshot is almost always the fastest way to communicate the issue. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else worth knowing: which kind of file you were editing
(CLAUDE.md, SKILL.md, plain markdown), whether the embedded terminal was
open, whether you had multiple windows, recent changes to your workspace,
etc. -->
